summary: Applied all 7 Stage 2 consistency review findings to the design policy document. DR2-001 (must_fix): Added explicit code examples showing Copilot builtins in both basePath and cache branches of getSlashCommandGroups(), with a note about the existing Codex asymmetry. DR2-002 (should_fix): Added explicit documentation of deduplicateByName() parameter position showing builtins in the first argument (lower priority). DR2-003 (should_fix): Changed SELECTION_LIST_REASONS to Set<string> and removed 'as const' assertion. DR2-004 (should_fix): Added cliToolId === 'copilot' guard condition requirement with code example for Step 1.6. DR2-005 (nice_to_have): Added note about filePath empty string validation for downstream consumers. DR2-006 (nice_to_have): Specified status-detector.ts as the definitive placement for SELECTION_LIST_REASONS. DR2-007 (nice_to_have): Added note confirming filterCommandsByCliTool() requires no changes.
